mapper.select: SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY view_count DESC, like_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM article WHERE status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY created_at DESC
